inputs.prompt: Epic cinematic movie poster in the style of Denis Villeneuve, featuring vast, dramatic landscapes with a sense of scale and isolation. Moody, atmospheric lighting with strong contrasts, muted yet striking color palette, cinematic depth of field. Futuristic and mysterious elements, subtle sci-fi technology integrated into the environment, minimalistic yet powerful composition. Evocative, suspenseful mood, ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic textures, breathtaking and immersive scene.
